Professional Summary

I'm Muhammad Ali, a seasoned developer with 6+ years of expertise in Cloud APPs, PaaS, Web and API Development. I did my BS in Information Technology in 2017, and since then, I've crafted exceptional web solutions for clients worldwide. My skills cover a wide range of technologies, including Laravel, Inertia.js, PHP, MySQL, and more. I'm well-versed in server configurations, VPS, and AWS services. I excel in integrating APIs like Graph API, Google Maps, AdWords, Send Grid and many more. I've developed custom E-commerce solutions for global companies, handling Inventory, Sales, Order Processing, and Customer Management. If you seek a developer passionate about innovation and skilled in solving complex challenges, Try Me!

Work Experience

Principal Software Engineer

Waada Digital Pvt Ltd

Jan 2022 – Present
  • Team leader and mentor, overseeing a team of five talented developers.
  • Shaped application architecture and nurtured team growth.
  • Led development of company website using Laravel and VueJs for insurance policy sales.
  • Automated agent model for seamless login, sales, and commission processing.
  • Developed critical modules for Laravel/Bootstrap BackOffice system.
  • Created a Subscription model using NodeJS, Sequelize ORM, and Postgres for premium collection from Telcos.

Full Stack Software Engineer

Ahdus Technologies

Apr 2021 – Dec 2022
  • Engineered a comprehensive Auction System (KAdomino) from scratch.
  • Developed admin panel, customer portal, and frontend website.
  • Built modules for bidding, auctions, CRM, CMS, user/role management, domain listing, and IANA integration.
  • Performed data crawling for German e-commerce sites and developed Shopify custom apps.

Senior Software Engineer

Trixxa Technologies

Jun 2020 – Mar 2021
  • Managed and led a team of 2, overseeing impactful projects.
  • Webuppers: App builder for APK/IPA files with certificate signing (Laravel, Phonegap/Cordova).
  • Event Management Website: Admin portal and CMS for event management.
  • Security Platform: Checked for compromised credentials using Laravel and Have I Been Pwned API.
  • Budget Calculator: Google AdWords-based advertising cost calculator.
  • Review Master: Platform for medical doctors to collect reviews from 10+ platforms (Laravel, Graph API, Google APIs).
  • IMG Server Marketplace: Marketplace for artwork and storage with dynamic form builder.
  • Bytbond Chrome Extension: Password management and ad tracking/blocking with Laravel admin panel.

Software Engineer and Server Admin

TailorTag LLC

Dec 2019 – 2021
  • Led a team of 3 designers, 3 marketers, and 1 frontend developer to build a comprehensive e-commerce solution.
  • Developed website, carting system, product/variant management, inventory, CRM, CMS, logistics, and sales tools.
  • Built an expenses tracker for Facebook campaigns and an Order Management System (OMS) integrated with sales pages via APIs.

Software Engineer and Server Admin
